headlines.headline: Brevep Systems reports rising costs pressuring margins in wireless connectivity

headlines.headline: Crevex Labs secures $250M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $250M contract with a global retailer provides a substantial and positive boost to the company's revenue outlook.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
